title: Xtra Juicy Tunisian Bresaola Tagine
description: A fresh and juicy Tunisian dish featuring bresaola, cooked in a clay pot to perfection, suitable for satvik friendly diet.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced bresaola to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Heat the clay pot over medium heat and add the chopped onions.
Cook the onions until they are translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic to the clay pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the coated bresaola to the clay pot and cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Cover the clay pot and transfer it to the preheated tandoor.
Cook the tagine for 20 minutes or until the bresaola is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
